metadata.title: UK Higher Education Providers
metadata.description: A tribute to Peter Burden's UK University Maps (University of Wolverhampton, 1994–2004). Data from learning-provider.data.ac.uk, Wikidata, and HESA Discover Uni.
sources: Wikidata P4971 (UKPRN linkage, founded year, Wikipedia URLs)
HESA Discover Uni dataset (institution type classification)
metadata.tribute: In tribute to Peter Burden, University of Wolverhampton, who created the original UK University Active Map in July 1994.
